code:
stateDiagram state "This is a state description of HR600 Workflow" as s2 [Infra_RedisCache] --> Login Login --> if_backupData if_backupData --> StartWorkflow: false if_backupData --> is_networkAvailable : true is_networkAvailable --> BackupToNetwork: true Note right of BackupToNetwork: There is still unsaved production data in the backup directory.
Do you want to transfer the data to the network drive now? is_networkAvailable --> RemainingBackup: false Note right of RemainingBackup: There is production data in the backup directory that has not yet been backed up.
The network drive for backing up the data is not available.
The data cannot be transferred. StartWorkflow --> FinishWorkflow FinishWorkflow --> [Infra_EtcdCluster] StartWorkflow --> MesDataToNetwork MesDataToNetwork --> StartWorkflow MesDataToNetwork --> Crash Note right of Crash: The transfer of the packed production data export file failed.
The data will be saved to a local backup directory.
Please make sure that the network drive is available and access is granted.
You can move the cached data to the network drive again the next time you start HRSoft2. Note right of Crash: The backup of the packed production data export file to the backup directory failed.
Please make sure that the backup directory is available and access is granted.
You may find the production data unpacked on the temporary directory TempArchiveFiles.
You can also initiate a manual export from the HRSoft2 archives.
If the problem persists, please contact Ersa service. Note right of Crash: An error occurred while generating the zip file of the production data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while generating the CSV data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just created.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while querying the database for the last entry.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. MesDataToNetwork --> FinishWorkflow [Infra_LoadBalancer] Crash --> FinishWorkflow Crash --> Backup [Infra_RedisCache]
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HR600工作流画一个状态图，核心是从Redis缓存开始，经过Login节点，然后有个关键判断：是否需要备份数据。如果不需要就直接启动工作流，需要的话还要检查网络是否可用。
明白，网络可用和不可用的分支我理一下：网络通的话走BackupToNetwork，不通的话走RemainingBackup。这两个节点旁边需要加说明文字吗？比如提示用户还有未备份的生产数据。
对，BackupToNetwork右边标注提醒用户是否立即传输数据到网络驱动器；RemainingBackup那边要说明网络不可用，数据无法传输，暂时留在本地备份目录。
好的，主干我画好了：StartWorkflow之后到FinishWorkflow，然后连到Etcd集群。另外StartWorkflow还有个分支到MesDataToNetwork，这个节点能回到StartWorkflow形成循环，也能直接去FinishWorkflow。
MesDataToNetwork还有个关键分支——出错情况。要有个Crash节点，从MesDataToNetwork连过去。Crash后面要能回到FinishWorkflow，也能连到Backup节点做本地备份兜底。
Crash节点的注释比较多，我整理一下：右边要有传输失败、备份目录失败、ZIP生成失败三种情况；左边还要有CSV生成失败和数据库查询失败。每种都要告诉用户怎么手动处理或联系Ersa服务。
等等，我检查一下——你漏了LoadBalancer，虽然它暂时是孤立节点，但架构上必须画出来。还有RedisCache出现了两次，第二次那个重复的删掉，只保留开头的入口。
已修正，LoadBalancer加上去了，重复的RedisCache已移除。最后确认一下整体结构：标题用s2标注"This is a state description of HR600 Workflow"，所有节点和流转关系都按你说的布置完成。
